Class TutorialScene

java.lang.Object
javafx.scene.Node
javafx.scene.Parent
javafx.scene.layout.Region
javafx.scene.layout.Pane
javafx.scene.layout.VBox
gui.TutorialScene
All Implemented Interfaces:
RunAfterChange, javafx.css.Styleable, javafx.event.EventTarget
public class TutorialScene extends javafx.scene.layout.VBox implements RunAfterChange
Represents the tutorial scene UI.
